result:
CORS errors mean browser blocked cross-origin request.

Common causes:
- frontend at one origin (localhost:3000) calling API at another (localhost:8000) without server sending Access-Control-Allow-Origin
- preflight OPTIONS request failing — server not handling OPTIONS or missing Access-Control-Allow-Methods/Headers
- credentials mode mismatch — sending cookies but server returns Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * instead of exact origin
- custom header (Authorization, X-Foo) triggering preflight that server not configured for

Fix on server side, not client. Add CORS middleware with explicit allowed origin, methods, headers. If using cookies, set Allow-Credentials: true and origin to exact match (not wildcard).

Paste the actual error text + your stack (frontend framework, backend) if you want specific fix.
